name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
【Gold Butterfly💯 5-Grid Embroidery Lady】Lady Dior Embroidery Bag. The "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo is fashionable and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidery shoulder strap for versatile carrying options. Detachable double-sided embroidery wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Can be paired with other embroidery straps as desired.
Size: 24 cm x 20 cm x 11 cm
